creator: aeuii@posteo.de
text:
The version in ports is outdated (1.9, May 2012) and the newest (1.10.4, July 2016) fixes many bugs and improvements. Most importantly, it has a new lua config system. It would be very useful to have it ported to FreeBSD. Please enable lua by default, so it's available as the binary package. (lua is a very small dependency)

Thank you for taking care of this port.

Best,
Stefan
